'''Brusela''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the grandmother of [[Bria Tharen]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Biography==
[[Renn Tharen]], wanting to honor his mother and mother-in-law both, yet not wanting his daughter to be stuck with either of their names, combined the first syllables of their names, Brusela and [[Iaphagena]], to make Bria.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1stm}}
